---
title: "GPPP"
author: "sss322"
date: "2025-10-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r}
load("C:/Users/Siim Sepp/NY_WMB/data/data_mq.Rdata")
load("C:/Users/Siim Sepp/NY_WMB/data/VImat.Rdata")
load("C:/Users/Siim Sepp/NY_WMB/data/geno/WMB_master_geno.RData")
```


```{r}
load("C:/Users/Siim Sepp/NY_WMB/analysis/PP_LM_results_ag_raw.Rdata")
load("C:/Users/Siim Sepp/NY_WMB/analysis/PP_LM_results_mq_raw.Rdata")


table(PP_LM_results_ag_raw$predictions$Environment, PP_LM_results_ag_raw$predictions$Trait, PP_LM_results_ag_raw$predictions$Model, PP_LM_results_ag_raw$predictions$Predictor_Set, PP_LM_results_ag_raw$predictions$Cycle)

str(PP_LM_results_ag_raw$predictions)
```


```{r}
# ---- Libraries ----
library(dplyr)
library(asreml)
library(ASRgenomics)

# ---- HELPERS ----
prep_Ginv <- function(Gsub, eig.tol = 1e-3) {
  Gb   <- ASRgenomics::G.tuneup(G = Gsub, bend = TRUE, eig.tol = eig.tol)$Gb
  ASRgenomics::G.inverse(G = Gb, sparse = TRUE)$Ginv
}

fit_bv <- function(df_gid_y, A1_sub) {
  if (nrow(df_gid_y) < 5) return(NULL)
  Ginv <- prep_Ginv(A1_sub)
  df_gid_y$GID <- factor(df_gid_y$GID, levels = rownames(A1_sub))
  mod <- tryCatch(
    asreml(y ~ 1, random = ~ vm(GID, Ginv), residual = ~ idv(units),
           data = df_gid_y, na.action = list(x="include", y="include"), ai.sing = TRUE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(mod)) return(NULL)
  p <- predict(mod, classify = "GID")$pvals
  names(p)[names(p) == "predicted.value"] <- "BV"
  p[, c("GID","BV")]
}

# ---- MAIN: Genomic CV using cached UAV OOF predictions ----
# Arguments:
#   preds         : your PP_LM_results_ag_raw$predictions
#   data_ag       : mapping table with Env, GID, plot_id, and observed trait columns
#   A1            : genomic relationship matrix (rownames = GIDs)
#   model_keep    : "Random Forest" or another label from preds$Model
#   vi_keep       : one or more Predictor_Set values (e.g., "NDVI")
#   strict_truth  : if TRUE, compute BV "truth" per fold using only training phenotypes
genomic_cv_with_cached_uav <- function(preds, data_ag, A1,
                                       model_keep = "Random Forest",
                                       vi_keep    = NULL,
                                       strict_truth = TRUE) {

  # 0) Filter to desired model/VI
  if (!is.null(model_keep)) preds <- preds %>% filter(Model %in% model_keep)
  if (!is.null(vi_keep))    preds <- preds %>% filter(Predictor_Set %in% vi_keep)

  # 1) Ensure harmonized names
  data_ag <- data_ag %>%
    rename(Environment = Env) # if your column is already 'Environment', remove this line

  # 2) Attach GID to predictions
  #    If preds already has GID, skip; otherwise, merge via plot_id mapping.
  needs_gid <- !"GID" %in% names(preds)
  if (needs_gid) {
    stop("Your predictions table lacks GID. Please add GID or provide a plot_id→GID map and merge here.")
  }

  # 3) We’ll work per Environment × Trait × Predictor_Set × Model
  keys <- preds %>%
    distinct(Environment, Trait, Predictor_Set, Model)

  out_all <- list()

  for (ii in seq_len(nrow(keys))) {
    ENV <- keys$Environment[ii]
    TR  <- keys$Trait[ii]
    VI  <- keys$Predictor_Set[ii]
    MD  <- keys$Model[ii]

    message("\n=== Env=", ENV, " | Trait=", TR, " | VI=", VI, " | Model=", MD, " ===")

    # Slice predictions & observed data
    pr <- preds %>%
      filter(Environment == ENV, Trait == TR, Predictor_Set == VI, Model == MD)

    # Reduce to the GID-level (if there are multiple rows per GID per Cycle, average)
    # (If your preds are already one row per GID×Cycle, this just keeps them)
    pr_gid <- pr %>%
      group_by(Environment, Trait, Predictor_Set, Model, Cycle, GID) %>%
      summarise(
        UAV_pred = mean(Predicted, na.rm = TRUE),
        True_obs = mean(True, na.rm = TRUE),  # True = observed trait on those rows
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    # All GIDs considered in this Env/Trait
    gids_all <- unique(pr_gid$GID)
    gids_all <- intersect(gids_all, rownames(A1))
    if (length(gids_all) < 10) {
      warning("Too few GIDs after intersecting with A1; skipping ", ENV, " / ", TR)
      next
    }

    # 4) Choose "truth" BVs:
    #    a) strict_truth: per fold, mask test GIDs' y and fit ASReml on train only
    #    b) else: global BV from all y (fast but mildly optimistic)
    if (strict_truth) {
      # Build a single y per GID from observed phenotypes in data_ag (env-specific)
      # If your observed trait is at plot-level, aggregate to GID
      y_obs <- data_ag %>%
        filter(Environment == ENV) %>%
        transmute(GID, y = .data[[TR]]) %>%
        group_by(GID) %>% summarise(y = mean(y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
        filter(!is.na(y))

      # Keep only GIDs in A1 and in preds
      y_obs <- y_obs %>% filter(GID %in% gids_all)

      # Pre-split by Cycle (folds come from preds)
      folds <- sort(unique(pr_gid$Cycle))
      truth_fold <- list()

      for (f in folds) {
        test_g  <- pr_gid %>% filter(Cycle == f) %>% pull(GID) %>% unique()
        train_g <- setdiff(y_obs$GID, test_g)

        df_train <- y_obs %>% mutate(y = ifelse(GID %in% train_g, y, NA_real_))
        keep     <- df_train$GID %in% rownames(A1)
        df_train <- df_train[keep, , drop = FALSE]
        A1_sub   <- A1[df_train$GID, df_train$GID, drop = FALSE]

        bv <- fit_bv(df_gid_y = df_train, A1_sub = A1_sub)
        if (is.null(bv)) next
        bv$fold <- f
        names(bv)[names(bv) == "BV"] <- "BV_true"
        truth_fold[[length(truth_fold)+1]] <- bv[, c("GID","BV_true","fold")]
      }
      truth_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(truth_fold)

    } else {
      # Global BV from all phenotypes
      y_obs <- data_ag %>%
        filter(Environment == ENV) %>%
        transmute(GID, y = .data[[TR]]) %>%
        group_by(GID) %>% summarise(y = mean(y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
        filter(GID %in% gids_all, !is.na(y))

      A1_gl  <- A1[y_obs$GID, y_obs$GID, drop = FALSE]
      bv_gl  <- fit_bv(df_gid_y = y_obs, A1_sub = A1_gl)
      truth_tbl <- bv_gl %>% rename(BV_true = BV)
    }

    # 5) Genomic CV using UAV OOF phenotypes
    #    For each Cycle = fold: fit ASReml with Y = UAV_pred (mask test as NA), predict BV_cv,
    #    and correlate against BV_true on test GIDs only.
    folds <- sort(unique(pr_gid$Cycle))
    res_env_trait <- list()

    for (f in folds) {
      test_g  <- pr_gid %>% filter(Cycle == f) %>% pull(GID) %>% unique()
      train_g <- setdiff(gids_all, test_g)

      # Build the phenotype table at GID-level: one row per GID with OOF prediction
      # If multiple rows per GID remain, average within fold
      oof_gid <- pr_gid %>%
        group_by(GID) %>%
        summarise(UAV_oof = mean(UAV_pred, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

      df_asr <- oof_gid %>% mutate(Y = UAV_oof,
                                   Y_masked = ifelse(GID %in% test_g, NA_real_, UAV_oof)) %>%
        select(GID, Y_masked) %>%
        rename(Y = Y_masked) %>%
        filter(GID %in% rownames(A1))

      A1_sub <- A1[df_asr$GID, df_asr$GID, drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(A1_sub) < 5) {
        res_env_trait[[length(res_env_trait)+1]] <- data.frame(
          Environment = ENV, Trait = TR, Predictor_Set = VI, Model = MD,
          Fold = f, CorVal = NA_real_
        )
        next
      }

      Ginv <- prep_Ginv(A1_sub)
      df_asr$GID <- factor(df_asr$GID, levels = rownames(A1_sub))

      mod <- tryCatch(
        asreml(Y ~ 1, random = ~ vm(GID, Ginv), residual = ~ idv(units),
               data = df_asr, na.action = list(x="include", y="include"), ai.sing = TRUE),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (is.null(mod)) {
        res_env_trait[[length(res_env_trait)+1]] <- data.frame(
          Environment = ENV, Trait = TR, Predictor_Set = VI, Model = MD,
          Fold = f, CorVal = NA_real_
        )
        next
      }

      pred_cv <- predict(mod, classify = "GID")$pvals %>%
        select(GID, predicted.value) %>%
        rename(BV_cv = predicted.value)

      # Pick appropriate truth for this fold
      if ("fold" %in% names(truth_tbl)) {
        truth_f <- truth_tbl %>% filter(fold == f) %>% select(GID, BV_true)
      } else {
        truth_f <- truth_tbl %>% select(GID, BV_true)
      }

      mt <- merge(pred_cv, truth_f, by = "GID")
      mt <- mt %>% filter(GID %in% test_g)

      cor_val <- if (nrow(mt) > 2) cor(mt$BV_cv, mt$BV_true, use = "complete.obs") else NA_real_

      res_env_trait[[length(res_env_trait)+1]] <- data.frame(
        Environment = ENV, Trait = TR, Predictor_Set = VI, Model = MD,
        Fold = f, CorVal = cor_val
      )
    }

    out_all[[length(out_all)+1]] <- bind_rows(res_env_trait)
  }

  bind_rows(out_all)
}

```




```{r}
mqtraits <- colnames(data_mq)[4:15]
envs<- unique(data_mq$Env)
VIs<- names(VImats$KET21)


save(GP_PP_MM_mq, file = "GP_PP_MM_results_mq.Rdata")
```
